---
title: "Differential expression plots"
format: html
---

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "..")

import importlib.util
_spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mock_data", "00_mock_data.py")
_m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(_spec); _spec.loader.exec_module(_m)

de_df    = _m.make_mock_de_results(n_genes=2000, seed=42)
coef_df  = _m.make_mock_coefs(n_features=100, seed=42)
adata    = _m.make_mock_anndata(n_cells=500, n_genes=50, seed=42)
```

## `plot_volcano` — defaults

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_volcano

p_vol = plot_volcano(de_df, gene_col="gene",
                     title="Volcano plot — default thresholds")
p_vol
```

### Custom label_genes

```{python}
p_labeled = plot_volcano(
    de_df, gene_col="gene",
    label_genes=["Gene0001", "Gene0010", "Gene0050"],
    title="Volcano — highlighted genes",
)
p_labeled
```

### Trimmed axes

```{python}
p_xlim = plot_volcano(
    de_df, gene_col="gene",
    xlim=(-4, 4), ylim=(0, 8),
    title="Volcano — custom axis limits",
)
p_xlim
```

## `plot_ma` alongside Volcano

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_ma

p_ma = plot_ma(de_df, gene_col="gene", label_top_n=5,
               title="MA plot")
p_ma
```

## `plot_coef_lollipop` — model coefficients

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_coef_lollipop

coef_series = coef_df["coefficient"]
p_lollipop = plot_coef_lollipop(coef_series, top_n=20,
                                  title="Top-20 elastic net coefficients")
p_lollipop
```

### With error bars

```{python}
p_se = plot_coef_lollipop(coef_df, top_n=20, se_col="se",
                            title="Coefficients with standard errors")
p_se
```

## `plot_coef_expression` — paired expression view

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_coef_expression

# Use the AnnData gene names as coefficient indices
import pandas as pd
var_names = list(adata.var_names)
coef_matched = pd.Series(
    [0.5 - i * 0.05 for i in range(len(var_names))],
    index=var_names,
)

p_dot = plot_coef_expression(
    adata, coef_matched, group_by="cluster",
    plot_type="dot", top_n=10,
    title="Top-10 features — dot plot",
)
p_dot
```

```{python}
hm = plot_coef_expression(
    adata, coef_matched, group_by="cluster",
    plot_type="heatmap", top_n=10,
    title="Top-10 features — heatmap",
)
hm.plot
```
